svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="h0zXGPswf4YPijRvFuM9" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-415" dy="-157" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="760" pageHeight="556" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="图：从单个神经元到全连接层（Linear）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="700" x="30" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ta" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#1e6b1e;fontSize=13;align=left;fontStyle=1;" value="① 单个神经元 = 加权求和 + 偏置" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="420" x="40" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="x1" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;" value="x₁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="44" x="60" y="96" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="x2" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;" value="x₂" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="44" x="60" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="x3" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;" value="xₙ" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="44" x="60" y="204" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xdots" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#888888;fontSize=16;align=center;" value="⋮" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="44" x="60" y="186" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sum" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="z = w₁x₁ + w₂x₂ + … + wₙxₙ + b" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="230" y="138" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bias" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="b" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="44" x="318" y="262" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zout" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="z" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="44" x="520" y="148" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zact" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#777777;fontSize=12;align=left;" value="→ 送入激活函数（见 §4）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="170" x="582" y="158" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex1" edge="1" parent="1" source="x1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.4;fontColor=#444444;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="sum" value="w₁"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex2" edge="1" parent="1" source="x2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.4;fontColor=#444444;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="sum" value="w₂"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ex3" edge="1" parent="1" source="x3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.4;fontColor=#444444;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="sum" value="wₙ"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb" edge="1" parent="1" source="bias" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=1.4;fontColor=#a6822a;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;" target="sum" value="加上偏置"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ez" edge="1" parent="1" source="sum" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.4;" target="zout"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="div" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;html=1;strokeColor=#dddddd;strokeWidth=1;dashed=1;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="40" y="326" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="720" y="326" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tb" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#1e6b1e;fontSize=13;align=left;fontStyle=1;" value="② 全连接层 Linear = m 个这样的神经元并排（矩阵形式）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="500" x="40" y="340" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xvec" parent="1" style="shape=cube;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;size=8;" value="x
(n 维)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="64" x="80" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wbox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="y = W x + b" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="180" x="260" y="398" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="yvec" parent="1" style="shape=cube;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;size=8;" value="y
(m 维)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="64" x="540" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exv" edge="1" parent="1" source="xvec" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="wbox"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eyv" edge="1" parent="1" source="wbox" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="yvec"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wnote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#555555;fontSize=12;align=left;" value="W：m×n 权重矩阵（每行 = 一个神经元的权重） b：m 维偏置" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="110" x="640" y="402" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="bias 的作用：给每个神经元一个可学习的「平移量 / 阈值」，让输出不被强制过原点，决策边界能上下移动。Flatten：本网络主干输出的特征图 (C×H×W) 先摊平成一维向量，再送进两个头里的 Linear。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="48" width="680" x="40" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: bias 的作用：给每个神经元一个可学习的「平移量 / 阈值」，让输出不被强制过原点，决策边界能上下移动。Flatten：本网络主干输出的特征图 (C×H×W) 先摊平成一维向量，再送进两个头里的 Linear。
